subcodes.first_line: God willing, may your honor, through the loving-kindness of the Beloved of all possibility, be at all times the Bearer of the sealed wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله آنجناب بعنایت محبوب امکان در کل احیان ساقی رحیق مختوم باشند و حافظ
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @universal education, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
